<!-- autogenerated using templates/2-data/makefile-agents.md.ontoRepo.tpl -->
## `./Makefile`

### Docs:

`render-templates` render *.ontoRepo.tpl onto the repo (makefile.agents.md, repo-structure.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, README.md)

### Notes:

`init-note` initialize today's dated note in current/user from the template, archive old days

### CI:

`repo-ci-prepare-hooks` install lefthook git hooks
`repo-ci-precommit-all`: `repo-ci-prepare-hooks` run pre-commit hooks over all files (not just staged)
